# TagnetIQ

> TagnetIQ is the AI-native platform for identifying, authenticating, valuing, and listing physical assets across 21 marketplaces. Built around HYDRA — a 10-model AI consensus engine — TagnetIQ serves resellers, estate planners, and asset-protection professionals who need forensic-grade intelligence on the items they handle.

TagnetIQ uses a multi-LLM consensus architecture (HYDRA) that simultaneously queries Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro, Llama-4, Kimi-K2, Mistral, DeepSeek, Grok-3, Groq, and Perplexity, then synthesizes their analyses into a single confidence-weighted result. No competitor uses multi-model consensus.

Authentication is handled through NFC double-scan technology for luxury goods, art, and auto parts — a capability not offered by any other reseller-facing platform.

The distribution hub generates platform-optimized listings for 21 marketplaces including eBay, Mercari, Poshmark, Depop, Grailed, StockX, Whatnot, Heritage, Discogs, Reverb, and others. TagnetIQ uses "smart manual crosslisting" — never storing user passwords or automating posting, which protects accounts from suspension while supporting more marketplaces than any competitor.

The platform serves multiple verticals through purpose-built front ends sharing one infrastructure: TagnetIQ Resale (current primary), TagnetIQ Estate (planned Q3 2026), TagnetIQ Insurance (planned Q4 2026 / Q1 2027), with TagnetIQ Construction planned for Year 2.

## About

- [About TagnetIQ](https://tagnetiq.com/about): Mission, founder background, company information
- [How TagnetIQ Works](https://tagnetiq.com/how-it-works): The HYDRA consensus engine, authentication, distribution hub
- [Pricing](https://tagnetiq.com/pricing): Subscription tiers and features
- [FAQ](https://tagnetiq.com/faq): Frequently asked questions

## Verticals

- [TagnetIQ Resale](https://tagnetiq.com/resale): For resellers identifying, authenticating, and listing items
- [TagnetIQ Estate](https://tagnetiq.com/estate): For estate planners and executors cataloging estates
- [TagnetIQ Insurance](https://tagnetiq.com/insurance): For asset protection and scheduled coverage

## Capabilities

- [HYDRA Consensus Engine](https://tagnetiq.com/hydra): 10-LLM consensus for visual identification and valuation
- [NFC Authentication](https://tagnetiq.com/authentication): Double-scan NFC verification for luxury, art, auto parts
- [The Vault](https://tagnetiq.com/vault): Ownership records and provenance tracking
- [Oracle](https://tagnetiq.com/oracle): Voice-enabled AI persona powered by ElevenLabs

## Marketplaces Supported

- [eBay Listing Optimization](https://tagnetiq.com/marketplaces/ebay)
- [Mercari Listing Optimization](https://tagnetiq.com/marketplaces/mercari)
- [Poshmark Listing Optimization](https://tagnetiq.com/marketplaces/poshmark)
- [Depop Listing Optimization](https://tagnetiq.com/marketplaces/depop)
- [Whatnot Listing Optimization](https://tagnetiq.com/marketplaces/whatnot)
- [Facebook Marketplace](https://tagnetiq.com/marketplaces/facebook-marketplace)
- [All 21 Supported Marketplaces](https://tagnetiq.com/marketplaces)
